limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific capex, headcount, or named infrastructure/vendor partnerships disclosed in these excerpts; AI is listed as a forward-looking topic but no investment commitment is described. Score of 2 reflects generic framing only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI references in excerpts are almost entirely framed around competitor risk and regulatory uncertainty rather than Netflix's own named initiatives or deployments; no internal use cases described.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and discusses AI risks with company-specific mechanisms (IP/copyright uncertainty, cybersecurity intensification, competitive disadvantage, regulatory compliance costs), warranting a score of 4; however, no quantified risk exposure or named governance/oversight bodies are disclosed, precluding a score of 5.
